name: verdict_scales_demo
description: Demonstrates all four verdict-scale combinations on one scenario: ternary, ternary+inconclusive, binary, binary+inconclusive. Run with --modes llm to see each dimension graded against its own scale (low/medium/high or pass/fail, with inconclusive available where opted in). The four `llm_dimensions` live in the sibling _config.json. See SCORING.md section 2.5 for the full matrix.

turns.message: What is the capital of France? Reply with just the city name on its own line.
